svg.metadata: CUPIDS Lab — generated from _data/brand.yml. A dark, data-forward identity for a public-interest data lab: a near-black canvas, CU gold accents, an IBM Plex Mono wordmark, and a recurring Cupid motif — a heart pierced by a gold arrow — drawn in the Unicode "color heart" palette. Restrained and civic, with a little matchmaker playfulness.
